name: Focus Lightings Tech Co., Ltd.
summary: Focus Lightings Tech Co., Ltd. engages in the research and development, production, and sale of LED epitaxial wafers and chips in China. It offers white light chips for LED lighting applications, as well as provides contract energy management services. The company was formerly known as Jucan Optoelectronics Technology (Suzhou) Co., Ltd. Focus Lightings Tech Co., Ltd. was founded in 2010 and is headquartered in Suzhou, China.
